allow: Bash(# Try to find the game via Steam library folders cat ""/c/Program Files \(x86\)/Steam/config/libraryfolders.vdf"")

Bash(xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo ""=== {} ==="" && python3 -c ""import json; d=json.load\(open\(\\""{}\\""\)\); shops=d.get\(\\""shop_contents\\"", []\); print\(json.dumps\(shops[0] if shops else {}, indent=2\)\)"" 2>/dev/null')
Bash(find . -name "*.run" -exec python -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(open\(sys.argv[1]\)\); sys.exit\(0 if data.get\(''character_chosen''\) == ''IRONCLAD'' else 1\)" {} ; -print -quit)
